zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空格局
zh.content:
艾达币/美元整体呈弱势震荡结构，价格虽小幅反弹，但仍处于20日均线下方，短期趋势偏空，动能不足，多空博弈持续运行受压明显。

技术指标方面，MACD指标柱值持续为负且动能扩张，空头趋势占优；RSI缺失但结合价格结构判断，反弹动能不足整体偏弱延续震荡延续。

支撑位关注0.1442附近低点，若跌破可能下探0.1435区域；上方阻力在0.1461对应20日均线及短期成交密集区附近。

交易建议以区间操作为主，未突破20日均线前反弹偏空对待；若放量突破均线则转为短多思路，否则高抛低吸更稳健为宜。注意风险控制。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is moving in a narrow consolidation phase with minimal intraday volatility. Price action remains slightly compressed just below the 20-period simple moving average, indicating a lack of strong directional conviction. The market structure suggests a mild bearish bias, as repeated attempts to sustain levels above 0.1452 have not produced follow-through momentum. Overall sentiment reflects equilibrium between buyers and sellers.

Momentum indicators reinforce the neutral-to-bearish tone. The MACD reading remains negative at -0.00063, signaling weakening bullish momentum and continued downside pressure. With RSI unavailable, price behavior and moving averages become primary references. Trading below the SMA(20) at 0.14609 confirms that short-term trend strength is capped. The absence of divergence suggests consolidation rather than reversal.

Key support is located near the session low at 0.14424, which has repeatedly contained downside movement. A break below this level could expose further decline toward lower liquidity zones. Resistance is layered between 0.14523 and the SMA(20) at 0.14609, forming a dense overhead supply zone. Sustained movement above 0.1461 would be required to shift structure toward a bullish recovery.

Trading conditions favor range-based strategies rather than trend-following setups. Long positions are more favorable near 0.1442 with tight risk control below 0.1440, targeting a retest of resistance. Short-term short entries may be considered near 0.1452–0.1460 with confirmation of rejection signals. A decisive breakout above the SMA would invalidate bearish bias and open room for continuation higher.
